_doc: Daily shop modifiers — one rolled per refresh cycle (~15 minutes real-time). Each modifier biases buy/sell rates so the player has a reason to check the shop frequently. buy_mult applies to PRICES the shop charges (lower = better for player); sell_mult applies to GOLD the shop pays (higher = better for player). Apply only when the slot/rarity matches.

modifiers.name: Weapon Day
modifiers.description: Shop pays 2× for weapons; weapons cost 30% less.

modifiers.name: Armor Day
modifiers.description: Shop pays 2× for armor pieces; armor costs 30% less.

modifiers.name: Trinket Day
modifiers.description: Shop pays 2× for rings & amulets; jewellery costs 30% less.

modifiers.name: High Demand
modifiers.description: Shop pays 1.5× for everything you sell.

modifiers.name: Scarcity
modifiers.description: Stock is 50% more expensive but doubled in quality.
